title: MakeThisPlaceAHome
description: MakeThisPlaceAHome or MTPAH is a plugin, which gives the ability to easily create homepoints and teleport to them
body:
# MakeThisPlaceAHome (MTPAH)

MakeThisPlaceAHome or MTPAH is a small Kotlin project, which I started years ago, as a small project to test my framework in different environments.
This plugin is a small home plugin, which lets you create, delete and teleport to your own specific home points.
This plugin also allows the administrators, to easily teleport to the player's homes and manage them if they have to.

The different /home possibilities
- /home place -> Places your personal home (requires MTPAH.home.place)
- /home place <Player> -> Places the home of <Player> to your current location (requires MTPAH.home.placeOther)
- /home teleport -> Teleports you to your personal home (requires MTPAH.home.teleport)
- /home teleport <Player> -> Teleports you to the home of <Player> (requires MTPAH.home.teleportOther)
- /home delete -> Deletes your personal home (requires MTPAH.home.delete)
- /home delete <Player> -> Deletes the home of <Player> (requires MTPAH.home.deleteOther)
